title: Springtime
overview: Banri Tada, a freshman law student at a Tokyo university ended up arriving late for his entrance ceremony.

title: Lonely Girl
overview: Banri has a dream of himself, apparently injured, fleeing from a hospital, but upon awakening cannot remember any more than that.

title: Night Escape
overview: On the day of the scheduled club trip, Banri meets with Kouko and Nijigen, who is also invited.

title: Blackout
overview: After Linda finds them, she explains that she was out on a club retreat with the Festival Club, and brings Banri and Kouko to their campsite.

title: Body and Soul
overview: After finding the photo of him and Linda, Banri runs to the bridge where the accident that caused his amnesia occurred to remember more, but cannot.

title: Yes No
overview: In a dream, Banri remembers that after his love confession to Linda, she agreed to tell him her response the following night on the bridge where Banri would have his accident.

title: Masquerade
overview: Kouko tells Banri that she loves him, but before he can respond Kouko is arrested for stealing a bike that she used to catch up to Banri.

title: Reset
overview: In a flashback, Banri overhears Linda saying she does not see him as a lover, causing him to ignore her for days.

title: With You Again
overview: Kouko suddenly falls ill and does not come to school for several days.

title: In the Mirror
overview: Ghost Banri, having awakened back in his physical body, feels the urge to see Linda.

title: Trouble Party
overview: Banri and Kouko ride the train and discuss Kouko's new Festival Club nickname "RoboGirl," so named because she looks like a robot when she dances.

title: Don't Look Back
overview: Banri Tada is enjoying working as a waiter at the party, along with Nana, Mitsuo and Linda. Meanwhile, Kouko has texted Banri numerous times and is becoming concerned that he hasn't answered.

title: Summer Has Come
overview: As Ghost Banri watches, Banri dreams about when he was in the hospital and met with Linda, and about the message he was supposed to "pass along to her friend."

title: Ladies Talk
overview: 2D calls Banri and tells him that he heard Banri was lonely.

title: Accident Beach
overview: On the day of the trip to the beach, the group encounters several mishaps on the journey.

title: Wake-Up Call
overview: The accident gives Chinami a bloody lip, dents the car's bumper, and damages the guard rail.

title: Return to Yesterday
overview: Banri arrives at the Golden Time restaurant where the Festival Club is setting up for a gathering at the Fireworks Extravaganza and the club members are strangely welcoming and eerily nice, which sets Banri on edge.

title: My Hometown
overview: Kouko enters Banri's apartment alone after going through his mail because she misses him so much.

title: Night in Paris
overview: Banri discusses the event of ghost Banri falling from the bridge with a doctor, who can do nothing more than provide a sedative for him.

title: His Chasm
overview: After Chinami admonishes Banri for being too friendly with Linda because she's the girl Mitsuo likes, Banri catches up with Kouko to share everything that happened.

title: I'll Be Back
overview: After the incident at the Awa dance festival, Banri fears losing himself as his memories from before his accident return.

title: Paradise Lost
overview: Stunned by Kouko's words, Banri waits for her where she had rejected him, hoping she would come back.

title: Resignation
overview: Banri confronts Kouko; she explains the reason why she decided to resign from the Festival Club is due to Banri's unwillingness to be in the same place as her.

title: Golden Time
overview: Upon losing his recent memories, Banri returns to his hometown.
